hero.headline: *True* results you can see from the street
hero.subheadline: Your driveway has a color — we'll show you what it is.

services_section.label: THE CLEAN
services_section.heading: Every Surface, Every Stain
services_section.subheading: High-pressure cleaning that brings back the original

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Siding, brick, and exterior surfaces cleaned without damage. Removes mold, mildew, and years of buildup.

services.title: Driveway Cleaning
services.description: Oil stains, tire marks, and grime blasted away. You'll remember what color your concrete actually is.

services.title: Patio & Deck Restoration
services.description: Wood and concrete patios cleaned and restored. Safe for plants and outdoor furniture.

services.title: Commercial Cleaning
services.description: Storefronts, parking lots, and building exteriors. Keep your business looking professional.

about.heading: Built on Results
about.body: We're the Norfolk pressure washing team that shows up with the right equipment and gets the job done right. No shortcuts, no damage to your property.

reviews.name: Brandon J.
reviews.text: Completely blown away with the before and after results. The attention to detail and hard work really shows. Very reasonable pricing too.

reviews.name: Ethan S.
reviews.text: Did a fantastic job on my house, patio and driveway. Didn't even know the true color of my driveway until he was done. Professional and easy to work with.

reviews.name: Dwight J.
reviews.text: Did a great job! Highly recommend.

service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across Norfolk and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to See the Difference?
cta.body: Free estimates on all pressure washing projects. See what True Pressure Washing can reveal.
